summary: Trust Repair Sprint - Iteration 295 Testing Complete. All 13 backend tests PASS. Frontend UI validates correctly: admin credits show 999999/∞, Photo-to-Comic page loads with proper data-testids, Landing/Explore/Gallery pages all render images with onError fallback handlers. validate-asset endpoint correctly returns separate download_ready + preview_ready fields.

minor.issue: CORS error blocks direct browser loading of R2 images (pub-c251248e414545848d34b8c1b97ecdb3.r2.dev). SafeImage fallback handles this gracefully.
minor.note: Known issue from iteration 294 - R2 bucket needs CORS configuration

action_items: Consider configuring R2 bucket CORS headers to allow direct image loading (LOW priority - fallback works)
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: validate-asset endpoint returns separate download_ready + preview_ready fields (line 1171-1221 in photo_to_comic.py)
PASS: Admin credits display shows 999999 in Photo-to-Comic header and ∞ in dashboard
PASS: Dashboard.js has onError fallback on img tags (line 396)
PASS: Landing.js has onError fallback on img tags (line 279)
PASS: ExplorePage.js has onError fallback on img tags (line 130)
PASS: Gallery.js has onError fallback on img tags (lines 166, 361)
PASS: CreatorProfile.js has onError fallback on img tags (lines 80, 121)
PASS: Frontend resolveAssetState uses download_ready/preview_ready from backend (lines 307-356)
PASS: STATUS_CONFIG maps uiState to correct badge display (lines 473-478)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, credits display works, data-testids present)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Repair Sprint is complete. Key verifications: (1) validate-asset endpoint returns {download_ready, preview_ready} separately - allows frontend to distinguish CDN CORS issues from actual failures, (2) Admin credits show 999999/∞ correctly in both dashboard and Photo-to-Comic, (3) All 5 pages (Dashboard, Landing, ExplorePage, Gallery, CreatorProfile) have onError handlers on img tags that hide broken images and show gradient fallbacks, (4) PhotoToComic.js has strict UI state machine preventing contradictory states. R2 CORS issue remains (LOW priority) - images blocked by CORS but SafeImage handles gracefully with gradient fallback.
